description: Fiscal document in Arabic script. May mention a year at the top ([..]9), and elsewhere mentions various other numbers. In the main text block refers to Mīkhāʾīl b. Lā[..] al-[... the ghulām of 'the amīr [...] the glory of the caliphate and the pride of the religion (majd al-khilāfa fakhr al-dīn)' قسطر(?). Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
